The future of personalized learning

Teach. Learn. Connect Anywhere.

A secure, verified platform for online learning. Students discover elite teachers and book live classes instantly. Teachers create offerings, connect with students, and grow their teaching business securely.

Secure Payments & Booking

Everything you need for seamless learning

A complete platform designed to make finding and booking classes as simple as possible.

Verified Teachers

Every teacher goes through ID and qualification verification before teaching on our platform.

Easy Scheduling

Browse available time slots, request your preferred time, and get instant confirmations.

Video Classes

Auto-generated Google Meet links for seamless online learning experiences.

Secure Payments

Escrow-based payments. Funds released only after both parties confirm class completion.

Location-Based

Find teachers near you for in-person classes or connect online with anyone worldwide.

Direct Messaging

Chat directly with teachers to discuss requirements before booking.

How MiniUni works

From finding the right teacher to completing your class—simple, secure, and seamless.

01

Post or Browse

Post what you want to learn or browse through teacher profiles and available classes.

02

Connect & Discuss

Send inquiries, discuss your learning goals, and find the perfect match for your needs.

03

Book & Pay

Choose a time slot, pay securely. Your payment is held safely until class completion.

04

Learn & Grow

Join via the auto-generated meeting link, learn, and confirm completion to release payment.

Ready to start learning?

Join thousands of students finding their perfect teachers. Post what you want to learn and get matched instantly.

Find a Teacher

Share your expertise

Turn your knowledge into income. Set your own rates, create your schedule, and teach students from anywhere.

Start Teaching
MiniUni

Connecting passionate teachers with eager students. Learn anything, anytime, anywhere.
